transcript.q:
Welcome, and thank you so much for coming in today. It's great to meet you. I hope you didn't have too much trouble finding us.

I'm really looking forward to learning more about you and your background. We have a good conversation ahead of us, so let's dive right in.

To get things started, could you tell me a little bit about yourself and what drew you to software engineering as a career?
Thank you for that. Could you tell me a bit more about your technical background and what programming languages or technologies you are most comfortable working with?
